articles.title: Patriots coach Mike Vrabel focused on spring workouts after missing final day of draft last month
articles.description:
“My family is great. I love (his wife) Jen (Vrabel). I love the boys. I love my personal friends,” he said. “And then, this spring is focused on really the coaching staff, the players, more importantly than the coaching staff.”

The post Patriots coach Mike Vrabel focused on spring workouts after missing final day of draft last month appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Mike Vrabel talks offseason distractions, potential trades, and more
articles.description:
